name: Hubert Humphrey
description: vice president of the United States from 1965 to 1969
abstract: Hubert Horatio Humphrey Jr. (May 27, 1911 – January 13, 1978) was an American politician who served from 1965 to 1969 as the 38th vice president of the United States.

concerts.label: Testimonial Meeting: Salute to A. Philip Randolph

about_quotes.speaker: Sammy Price
about_quotes.evidence: From the Vice President of the United States, Hubert Humphrey, to Jimmy Carter... any of these people that you name, I've met.
